title: stichorkis trachyglossa
intro: Stichorkis trachyglossa is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia, specifically in the countries of India and Sri Lanka. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Stichorkis trachyglossa include its ability to aid in the healing process, reduce swelling, and prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of Stichorkis trachyglossa are often used in traditional medicine, where the plant is typically dried and made into a powder or decoction for application on affected areas.
